name: sql-backend
description: Implement SqlBackend for SQL query compilation using @ucast/sql
acceptanceCriteria: Custom $contains SqlOperator compiles to LIKE with parameterized wildcards
Manual ORDER BY clause construction (not part of @ucast/sql)
All queries use parameterized placeholders ($1, $2) - no string interpolation
joinRelation callback returns false (no automatic joins)
KNOWN LIMITATION: $eq: null generates = NULL (document in code)
